data.content: Moved prompt template rendering into production in src/installed_workflows/mod.rs, added output-mode block resolution for builtin skill prompts, populated per-profile rendered action prompts in src/installed_workflows/compatibility.rs, and merged builtin prompt variants into ProfileRegistry::load_for_repo() via src/profile.rs. Added registry tests covering compatibility-workflow rendering and builtin prompt merging. Validation: cargo test installed_workflows::tests_registry_ext; make sanity. Branch: knots-3239-profile-delivery-targets. Commit: 83c4749dfa52.
